src/services/taskEngine.ts:export async function createTask(taskData: Partial<Task>) {

src/services/taskEngine.ts:      ...taskData,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      status: 'pending',
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      priority: taskData.priority || 'medium',
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      department: taskData.department || null,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      ownerId,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    console.log(`[TaskEngine] ✅ Task created: ${taskRef.id} (${taskData.type})`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    return taskRef.id;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  } catch (error) {

src/services/taskEngine.ts:  }

src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:/**
src/services/taskEngine.ts: * 2. Orchestrates the execution of a task with internal claiming via transactions
src/services/taskEngine.ts: */
src/services/taskEngine.ts:export async function runTask(taskId: string, agentId: string) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  try {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const taskRef = doc(db, 'agent_tasks', taskId);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // 1. Try to claim the task via transaction
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const claimed = await claimTask(taskId, agentId);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    if (!claimed) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      console.log(`[TaskEngine] ⏭️ Task skipped: ${taskId} already claimed or not pending for ${agentId}`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      return null;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Get fresh data after claim
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const taskSnap = await getDoc(taskRef);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const task = { id: taskSnap.id, ...taskSnap.data() } as Task;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Workflow Guardrail: Check campaign status for production tasks
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const productionTasks: TaskType[] = ['brand_research', 'content_plan', 'design_direction', 'video_plan', 'ads_copy', 'whatsapp_sales_flow'];
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    if (productionTasks.includes(task.type) && task.campaignId) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      const briefSnap = await getDoc(doc(db, 'campaign_briefs', task.campaignId));
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      if (briefSnap.exists()) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        const brief = briefSnap.data();
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        if (brief.status !== 'approved') {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          console.log(`[TaskEngine] 🛑 Task blocked: Campaign ${task.campaignId} is not approved.`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          // Reset status to pending so it can be picked up later
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          await updateDoc(taskRef, { status: 'pending', claimedBy: null, claimedAt: null });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          return null;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Update Agent Status to Working
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    await updateAgentStatus(task.assignedTo, 'Working', taskId);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    console.log(`[TaskEngine] ⚙️ Running task: ${taskId} (${task.type})`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // 4. Execute Logic
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const result = await executeTask(task);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Create Deliverable if applicable
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const deliverableTypesList = ['brand_research', 'content_plan', 'design_direction', 'video_plan', 'ads_copy', 'whatsapp_sales_flow'];
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    if (deliverableTypesList.includes(task.type)) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'deliverables'), {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        brandId: task.brandId || null,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        campaignId: task.campaignId || null,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        ownerId: task.ownerId,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        department: task.department || 'General',
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        type: task.type,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        title: `${task.type.replace('_', ' ').toUpperCase()} - ${new Date().toLocaleDateString()}`,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        status: 'in_review',
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        version: 1,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        content: result,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        createdBy: task.assignedTo,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:

src/services/taskEngine.ts:      type: task.type,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      brandId: task.brandId || null,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      result,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      ownerId: task.ownerId,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Mark Task as Completed
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    await updateDoc(taskRef, {

src/services/taskEngine.ts:      completedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Update Agent Status to Idle
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    await updateAgentStatus(task.assignedTo, 'Idle');
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    console.log(`[TaskEngine] ✨ Task completed: ${taskId}`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // 3. Route Next Task automatically
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Only route automatically for tasks that DON'T create deliverables (which need approval)
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const deliverableTypesForRouting = ['brand_research', 'content_plan', 'design_direction', 'video_plan', 'ads_copy', 'whatsapp_sales_flow'];
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    if (!deliverableTypesForRouting.includes(task.type)) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      await routeNextTask(task);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    return result;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    console.error(`[TaskEngine] 💥 Error running task ${taskId}:`, error);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Update task with failure details

src/services/taskEngine.ts:      failedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Unknown error'
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:

src/services/taskEngine.ts:    const taskSnap = await getDoc(doc(db, 'agent_tasks', taskId));
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    if (taskSnap.exists()) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      const task = taskSnap.data() as Task;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      await updateAgentStatus(task.assignedTo, 'Idle');
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    throw error;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:}
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:/**
src/services/taskEngine.ts: * Claims a task for an agent using a Firestore transaction.
src/services/taskEngine.ts: * Ensures only one agent can process a task.
src/services/taskEngine.ts: */
src/services/taskEngine.ts:async function claimTask(taskId: string, agentId: string): Promise<boolean> {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  const taskRef = doc(db, 'agent_tasks', taskId);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  try {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    return await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      const taskDoc = await transaction.get(taskRef);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      if (!taskDoc.exists()) return false;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      const data = taskDoc.data() as Task;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      // Only claim if pending and assigned to this agent
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      if (data.status !== 'pending' || data.assignedTo !== agentId) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        return false;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      transaction.update(taskRef, {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        status: 'in_progress',
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        claimedBy: agentId,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        claimedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      return true;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    console.error(`[TaskEngine] ❌ Transaction failed for task ${taskId}:`, error);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    return false;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:}
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:/**
src/services/taskEngine.ts: * 4. Executes specific logic based on task type with real data integration
src/services/taskEngine.ts: */
src/services/taskEngine.ts:export async function executeTask(task: Task) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  console.log(`[TaskEngine] 🤖 Executing logic for: ${task.type}`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  // Simulate AI processing time

src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  switch (task.type) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    case 'campaign_kickoff': {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      if (!task.campaignId) throw new Error('Missing campaignId');
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      const briefSnap = await getDoc(doc(db, 'campaign_briefs', task.campaignId));
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      if (!briefSnap.exists()) throw new Error('Campaign brief not found');
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      const brief = briefSnap.data();
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      return {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        message: `Campaign "${brief.objective}" kicked off by CEO.`,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        strategy: `Targeting ${brief.audience} with ${brief.offer}.`,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        status: 'success'
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      };
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    case 'brand_research': {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      if (!task.brandId) throw new Error('Missing brandId');
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      const brandSnap = await getDoc(doc(db, 'brands', task.brandId));
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      if (!brandSnap.exists()) throw new Error('Brand not found');
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      const brand = brandSnap.data();
src/services/taskEngine.ts:

src/services/taskEngine.ts:        summary: `Research completed for ${brand.name}`,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        niche: brand.niche || '',
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        market: brand.market || '',
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        status: 'success'
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      };
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    case 'content_plan':
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      return {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        plan: "30-day content strategy generated.",
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        pillars: ["Educational", "Behind the scenes", "Product focus"],
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        status: "success"
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      };
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    case 'design_direction':
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      return {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        palette: ["#FF9A9E", "#FAD0C4"],
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        typography: "Inter, Space Grotesk",
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        mood: "Premium & Minimal",
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        status: "success"
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      };
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    case 'video_plan':
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      return {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        scripts: ["Script 1: Morning Routine", "Script 2: Why our serum works"],
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        shotList: ["Close up of product", "Application on skin"],
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        status: "success"
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      };
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    case 'ads_copy':
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      return {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        headline: "Unlock Your Natural Glow",

src/services/taskEngine.ts:/**
src/services/taskEngine.ts: * 3. Routing system to automatically create the next task in the flow
src/services/taskEngine.ts: */
src/services/taskEngine.ts:export async function routeNextTask(completedTask: Task) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  const flow: Record<string, { next: TaskType | null, agent: string, dept?: string }> = {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // Campaign Flow
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'campaign_kickoff': { next: 'brand_research', agent: 'brand_research_agent', dept: 'Research' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'brand_research': { next: 'content_plan', agent: 'content_agent', dept: 'Content' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'content_plan': { next: 'design_direction', agent: 'creative_agent', dept: 'Creative' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'design_direction': { next: 'video_plan', agent: 'video_agent', dept: 'Video' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'video_plan': { next: 'ads_copy', agent: 'media_buyer', dept: 'Media' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'ads_copy': { next: 'whatsapp_sales_flow', agent: 'whatsapp_agent', dept: 'Sales' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'whatsapp_sales_flow': { next: null, agent: '' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    // WhatsApp Lead Pipeline
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'lead_intake': { next: 'lead_qualification', agent: 'whatsapp_agent', dept: 'Sales' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'lead_qualification': { next: 'whatsapp_reply', agent: 'whatsapp_agent', dept: 'Sales' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'whatsapp_reply': { next: null, agent: '' }, // Could route to send_price if logic allows
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'send_price': { next: 'handoff_to_sales', agent: 'whatsapp_agent', dept: 'Sales' },
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    'handoff_to_sales': { next: null, agent: '' }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  };
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  const nextStep = flow[completedTask.type];
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  if (nextStep && nextStep.next) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    console.log(`[TaskEngine] ➡️ Routing next task: ${nextStep.next}`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    await createTask({
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      type: nextStep.next,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      assignedTo: nextStep.agent,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      department: nextStep.dept,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      brandId: completedTask.brandId,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      refId: completedTask.id,
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      priority: completedTask.priority || 'medium'
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  } else {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    console.log(`[TaskEngine] 🏁 Flow completed for: ${completedTask.type}`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:}
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:/**
src/services/taskEngine.ts: * Real-time listener for agent tasks
src/services/taskEngine.ts: * Listens for 'pending' tasks assigned to a specific agent and owner.
src/services/taskEngine.ts: */
src/services/taskEngine.ts:export function listenForAgentTasks(agentId: string, ownerId: string) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  const q = query(
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    collection(db, 'agent_tasks'),
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    where('ownerId', '==', ownerId),
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    where('assignedTo', '==', agentId),
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    where('status', '==', 'pending')
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  );
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  console.log(`[AgentListener] 👂 Started listening for tasks assigned to: ${agentId} for owner: ${ownerId}`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  return onSnapshot(q, async (snapshot) => {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    for (const change of snapshot.docChanges()) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      if (change.type === 'added' || change.type === 'modified') {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        const taskId = change.doc.id;
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        const taskData = change.doc.data();
src/services/taskEngine.ts:
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        if (taskData.status === 'pending') {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          console.log(`[AgentListener] 📥 Incoming task for ${agentId}: ${taskId} (${taskData.type})`);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          try {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:            // runTask handles the claim via transaction
src/services/taskEngine.ts:            await runTask(taskId, agentId);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          } catch (error) {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:            console.error(`[AgentListener] ❌ Critical error in task ${taskId}:`, error);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:          }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:        }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:      }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    }
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  }, (error) => {
src/services/taskEngine.ts:    console.error(`[AgentListener] 💥 Snapshot error for ${agentId}:`, error);
src/services/taskEngine.ts:  });
src/services/taskEngine.ts:}
src/services/taskEngine.ts:

src/services/deliverableService.ts:
src/services/deliverableService.ts:  try {

src/services/deliverableService.ts:        status: 'approved',
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp()

src/services/deliverableService.ts:

src/services/deliverableService.ts:        deliverableId: deliverable.id,
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        authorType: 'user',
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        authorId: userId,

src/services/deliverableService.ts:        actionType: 'approve',

src/services/deliverableService.ts:      });
src/services/deliverableService.ts:    });

src/services/deliverableService.ts:    
src/services/deliverableService.ts:    // Workflow logic: Approval triggers next task in flow

src/services/deliverableService.ts:    await routeNextTask({

src/services/deliverableService.ts:export async function createNewVersion(deliverableId: string, content: any, changeSummary: string, agentId: string) {
src/services/deliverableService.ts:  const deliverableRef = doc(db, 'deliverables', deliverableId);
src/services/deliverableService.ts:  
src/services/deliverableService.ts:  try {
src/services/deliverableService.ts:    await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      const snap = await transaction.get(deliverableRef);
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      if (!snap.exists()) throw new Error("Deliverable not found");
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      const data = snap.data() as Deliverable;
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      const nextVersion = (data.version || 1) + 1;
src/services/deliverableService.ts:
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      // 1. Create version record
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      const versionRef = doc(collection(db, 'deliverable_versions'));
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      transaction.set(versionRef, {
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        deliverableId,
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        version: nextVersion,
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        content,
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        changeSummary,
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        createdBy: agentId,
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      });
src/services/deliverableService.ts:
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      // 2. Update main deliverable
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      transaction.update(deliverableRef, {
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        version: nextVersion,
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        content,
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        status: 'in_review',
src/services/deliverableService.ts:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/services/deliverableService.ts:      });
src/services/deliverableService.ts:    });
src/services/deliverableService.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/services/deliverableService.ts:    console.error("[DeliverableService] ❌ Error creating new version:", error);

src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:/**
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts: * Initializes listeners for all agents in the system.
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts: * Returns a cleanup function to unsubscribe from all listeners.
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts: */
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:export function startAllAgentListeners(ownerId: string) {
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:  console.log("%c[Orchestrator] 🚀 Initializing Production AI Agent Listeners...", "color: #FF9A9E; font-weight: bold; font-size: 12px;");
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:  
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:  const unsubscribes = AGENT_IDS.map(agentId => {
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:    try {
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:      return listenForAgentTasks(agentId, ownerId);
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:    } catch (error) {
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:      console.error(`[Orchestrator] ❌ Failed to start listener for ${agentId}:`, error);
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:      return () => {}; // Return empty cleanup
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:    }
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:  });
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:  // Return a master cleanup function
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:  return () => {
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:    console.log("[Orchestrator] 🛑 Shutting down all AI Agent listeners...");
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:    unsubscribes.forEach(unsub => {
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:      if (typeof unsub === 'function') unsub();
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:    });
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:  };
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:}
src/services/agentOrchestrator.ts:

src/App.tsx:interface FirestoreErrorInfo {
src/App.tsx:  error: string;
src/App.tsx:  operationType: OperationType;
src/App.tsx:  path: string | null;
src/App.tsx:  authInfo: {
src/App.tsx:    userId: string | undefined;
src/App.tsx:    email: string | null | undefined;
src/App.tsx:    emailVerified: boolean | undefined;
src/App.tsx:    isAnonymous: boolean | undefined;
src/App.tsx:    tenantId: string | null | undefined;
src/App.tsx:    providerInfo: {
src/App.tsx:      providerId: string;
src/App.tsx:      displayName: string | null;
src/App.tsx:      email: string | null;
src/App.tsx:      photoUrl: string | null;
src/App.tsx:    }[];
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:function handleFirestoreError(error: unknown, operationType: OperationType, path: string | null) {
src/App.tsx:  const errInfo: FirestoreErrorInfo = {
src/App.tsx:    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
src/App.tsx:    authInfo: {
src/App.tsx:      userId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/App.tsx:      email: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/App.tsx:      emailVerified: auth.currentUser?.emailVerified,
src/App.tsx:      isAnonymous: auth.currentUser?.isAnonymous,
src/App.tsx:      tenantId: auth.currentUser?.tenantId,
src/App.tsx:      providerInfo: auth.currentUser?.providerData.map(provider => ({
src/App.tsx:        providerId: provider.providerId,
src/App.tsx:        displayName: provider.displayName,
src/App.tsx:        email: provider.email,
src/App.tsx:        photoUrl: provider.photoURL
src/App.tsx:      })) || []
src/App.tsx:    },
src/App.tsx:    operationType,
src/App.tsx:    path
src/App.tsx:  }
src/App.tsx:  console.error('Firestore Error: ', JSON.stringify(errInfo));
src/App.tsx:  // We don't throw here to avoid crashing the app, but we log it as required
src/App.tsx:}

src/App.tsx:  const bootstrapAgents = async (uid: string) => {
src/App.tsx:    const initialAgents: Partial<AIAgent>[] = [
src/App.tsx:      { name: 'CEO Agent', role: 'Strategic Oversight', status: 'Idle', tasksCompleted: 0, lastUpdate: new Date().toISOString() },
src/App.tsx:      { name: 'Brand Research Agent', role: 'Market Analysis', status: 'Idle', tasksCompleted: 0, lastUpdate: new Date().toISOString() },
src/App.tsx:      { name: 'Content Strategist', role: 'Creative Planning', status: 'Idle', tasksCompleted: 0, lastUpdate: new Date().toISOString() },
src/App.tsx:      { name: 'Creative Director', role: 'Visual Identity', status: 'Idle', tasksCompleted: 0, lastUpdate: new Date().toISOString() },
src/App.tsx:      { name: 'Video Producer', role: 'Motion Content', status: 'Idle', tasksCompleted: 0, lastUpdate: new Date().toISOString() },
src/App.tsx:      { name: 'Media Buyer', role: 'Ad Performance', status: 'Idle', tasksCompleted: 0, lastUpdate: new Date().toISOString() },
src/App.tsx:      { name: 'WhatsApp Sales Manager', role: 'Lead Conversion', status: 'Idle', tasksCompleted: 0, lastUpdate: new Date().toISOString() }
src/App.tsx:    ];
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    for (const agent of initialAgents) {
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'ai_agents'), { ...agent, ownerId: uid });
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Auth Listener
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onAuthStateChanged(auth, (u) => {
src/App.tsx:      setUser(u);
src/App.tsx:      setIsAuthReady(true);
src/App.tsx:      if (!u) {
src/App.tsx:        setBrands([]);
src/App.tsx:        setActiveBrand(null);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:    });
src/App.tsx:    return unsubscribe;
src/App.tsx:  }, []);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  // Data Listeners
src/App.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/App.tsx:    if (!user) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const brandsQuery = query(collection(db, 'brands'), where('ownerId', '==', user.uid));
src/App.tsx:    const unsubBrands = onSnapshot(brandsQuery, (snap) => {
src/App.tsx:      const bList = snap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as Brand));
src/App.tsx:      setBrands(bList);
src/App.tsx:      if (bList.length > 0 && !activeBrand) {
src/App.tsx:        setActiveBrand(bList[0]);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/App.tsx:    }, (err) => handleFirestoreError(err, OperationType.LIST, 'brands'));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const agentsQuery = query(collection(db, 'ai_agents'), where('ownerId', '==', user.uid));
src/App.tsx:    const unsubAgents = onSnapshot(agentsQuery, (snap) => {
src/App.tsx:      const aList = snap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as AIAgent));
src/App.tsx:      if (aList.length === 0 && !loading) {
src/App.tsx:        bootstrapAgents(user.uid);
src/App.tsx:      }
src/App.tsx:      setAgents(aList);
src/App.tsx:    }, (err) => handleFirestoreError(err, OperationType.LIST, 'ai_agents'));
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    const tasksQuery = query(collection(db, 'agent_tasks'), where('ownerId', '==', user.uid), orderBy('createdAt', 'desc'));

src/App.tsx:function OnboardingView({ user, onComplete, language }: { key?: string, user: User, onComplete: () => void, language: Language }) {
src/App.tsx:  const t = translations[language];
src/App.tsx:  const [step, setStep] = useState(1);
src/App.tsx:  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
src/App.tsx:    name: '',
src/App.tsx:    niche: 'Cosmetics',
src/App.tsx:    market: 'Egypt',
src/App.tsx:    website: '',
src/App.tsx:    facebook: '',
src/App.tsx:    instagram: '',
src/App.tsx:    tiktok: '',
src/App.tsx:    youtube: '',
src/App.tsx:    competitors: '',
src/App.tsx:    brandVoice: {
src/App.tsx:      language: language === 'ar' ? 'ar-eg' : 'en' as 'en' | 'ar-eg',
src/App.tsx:      tone: 'friendly' as 'friendly' | 'premium' | 'expert',
src/App.tsx:      description: ''
src/App.tsx:    },
src/App.tsx:    targetAudience: '',
src/App.tsx:    mainProducts: ''
src/App.tsx:  });
src/App.tsx:  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async () => {
src/App.tsx:    setIsSubmitting(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      // 1. Save Brand
src/App.tsx:      const brandRef = await addDoc(collection(db, 'brands'), {
src/App.tsx:        ...formData,
src/App.tsx:        competitors: formData.competitors.split(',').map(s => s.trim()),
src/App.tsx:        mainProducts: formData.mainProducts.split(',').map(s => s.trim()),
src/App.tsx:        ownerId: user.uid,
src/App.tsx:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
src/App.tsx:        assetUrls: []
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      // 2. Trigger AI Research
src/App.tsx:      const researchPrompt = `Act as a senior marketing strategist. Perform deep research for this brand:
src/App.tsx:      Brand: ${formData.name}
src/App.tsx:      Niche: ${formData.niche}
src/App.tsx:      Market: ${formData.market}
src/App.tsx:      Website: ${formData.website}
src/App.tsx:      Competitors: ${formData.competitors}
src/App.tsx:      Products: ${formData.mainProducts}
src/App.tsx:      Brand Voice Language: ${formData.brandVoice.language}
src/App.tsx:      Brand Voice Tone: ${formData.brandVoice.tone}
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      Output a JSON object. All text fields in the JSON must be in ${formData.brandVoice.language === 'ar-eg' ? 'Egyptian Arabic dialect (Ammiya)' : 'English'}.
src/App.tsx:      If Egyptian Arabic, use a natural, friendly, and conversational tone. Avoid formal Arabic.
src/App.tsx:      
src/App.tsx:      {
src/App.tsx:        "summary": "...",
src/App.tsx:        "positioning": "...",
src/App.tsx:        "audienceInsights": "...",
src/App.tsx:        "toneOfVoice": "...",
src/App.tsx:        "visualDirection": "...",
src/App.tsx:        "competitorNotes": "...",
src/App.tsx:        "contentOpportunities": ["...", "..."],
src/App.tsx:        "campaignAngle": "...",
src/App.tsx:        "recommendedOffer": "..."
src/App.tsx:      }`;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
src/App.tsx:        model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
src/App.tsx:        contents: researchPrompt,
src/App.tsx:        config: { responseMimeType: "application/json" }
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      const researchData = JSON.parse(response.text || '{}');
src/App.tsx:      await setDoc(doc(db, 'brand_research', brandRef.id), {
src/App.tsx:        brandId: brandRef.id,
src/App.tsx:        ownerId: user.uid,
src/App.tsx:        ...researchData,
src/App.tsx:        updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      onComplete();
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Onboarding failed:", error);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsSubmitting(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div className="min-h-screen p-4 md:p-10 flex items-center justify-center">
src/App.tsx:      <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:        initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
src/App.tsx:        animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
src/App.tsx:        className="max-w-2xl w-full bg-white rounded-[2rem] md:rounded-[3rem] p-6 md:p-12 shadow-2xl shadow-[#FF9A9E]/10 border border-[#FEE2E2]"
src/App.tsx:      >
src/App.tsx:        <div className="mb-8 md:mb-10">
src/App.tsx:          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
src/App.tsx:            <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-black text-[#2D2424]">{t.onboardBrand}</h2>
src/App.tsx:            <span className="text-[10px] md:text-xs font-black text-[#FF9A9E] uppercase tracking-widest">{t.step} {step} {t.of} 3</span>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="w-full h-1.5 bg-[#FDF2F2] rounded-full overflow-hidden">
src/App.tsx:            <motion.div initial={{ width: 0 }} animate={{ width: `${(step/3)*100}%` }} className="h-full bg-[#FF9A9E]" />
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        {step === 1 && (

src/App.tsx:function AssetManagerView({ brand, assets }: { key?: string, brand: any, assets: any }) {
src/App.tsx:  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  const handleUpload = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
src/App.tsx:    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
src/App.tsx:    if (!file || !brand) return;
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:    setIsUploading(true);
src/App.tsx:    try {
src/App.tsx:      const storageRef = ref(storage, `brands/${brand.id}/assets/${Date.now()}_${file.name}`);
src/App.tsx:      await uploadBytes(storageRef, file);
src/App.tsx:      const url = await getDownloadURL(storageRef);
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'brand_assets'), {
src/App.tsx:        brandId: brand.id,
src/App.tsx:        fileUrl: url,
src/App.tsx:        fileName: file.name,
src/App.tsx:        fileType: file.type,
src/App.tsx:        assetCategory: 'Product',
src/App.tsx:        tags: [],
src/App.tsx:        orientation: 'Portrait',
src/App.tsx:        recommendedUsage: 'Social Post',
src/App.tsx:        ownerId: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/App.tsx:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
src/App.tsx:      });
src/App.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/App.tsx:      console.error("Upload failed:", error);
src/App.tsx:    } finally {
src/App.tsx:      setIsUploading(false);
src/App.tsx:    }
src/App.tsx:  };
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} className="p-4 md:p-10 space-y-6 md:space-y-10">

src/App.tsx:          <p className="text-sm md:text-base text-[#8B7E7E]">Manage visual assets for <span className="text-[#FF9A9E] font-bold">{brand.name}</span></p>
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:        <label className="w-full md:w-auto px-8 py-4 bg-[#2D2424] text-white rounded-2xl font-bold flex items-center justify-center gap-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#4A3B3B] transition-all shadow-lg shadow-[#2D2424]/10">

src/App.tsx:                  <p className="text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-[#2D2424] line-clamp-1 w-full sm:w-64">{job.content}</p>
src/App.tsx:                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar">
src/App.tsx:                    {job.platforms.map((p: string) => (
src/App.tsx:                      <span key={p} className="text-[8px] md:text-[10px] font-black text-[#B9AFAF] uppercase whitespace-nowrap">{p}</span>
src/App.tsx:                    ))}
src/App.tsx:                  </div>
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:              </div>
src/App.tsx:              <div className="flex sm:flex-col items-center sm:items-end justify-between sm:justify-center gap-2">
src/App.tsx:                <span className={cn(
src/App.tsx:                  "px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[8px] md:text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider",
src/App.tsx:                  job.status === 'Published' ? "bg-green-100 text-green-600" : "bg-orange-100 text-orange-600"
src/App.tsx:                )}>
src/App.tsx:                  {job.status}
src/App.tsx:                </span>
src/App.tsx:                <p className="text-[8px] md:text-[10px] text-[#B9AFAF] font-bold">{new Date(job.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
src/App.tsx:              </div>
src/App.tsx:            </div>
src/App.tsx:          ))}
src/App.tsx:          {jobs.length === 0 && <p className="text-center text-[#B9AFAF] py-10 md:py-20 text-sm">No posts scheduled yet.</p>}
src/App.tsx:        </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:        <aside className="space-y-4 md:space-y-6">
src/App.tsx:          <h3 className="text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-[#B9AFAF] px-2">Upcoming Schedule</h3>
src/App.tsx:          <div className="bg-[#2D2424] rounded-[2rem] md:rounded-[2.5rem] p-6 md:p-8 text-white">
src/App.tsx:            <Calendar className="w-6 h-6 md:w-8 md:h-8 text-[#FF9A9E] mb-4" />
src/App.tsx:            <p className="text-sm font-bold mb-2">No upcoming posts</p>
src/App.tsx:            <p className="text-xs text-white/40">Schedule your first post to see your calendar here.</p>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        </aside>
src/App.tsx:      </div>
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:      <AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:        {isCreating && (
src/App.tsx:          <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 md:p-6">
src/App.tsx:            <motion.div initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0 }} className="absolute inset-0 bg-[#2D2424]/40 backdrop-blur-sm" onClick={() => setIsCreating(false)} />
src/App.tsx:            <motion.div 
src/App.tsx:              initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: 20 }}
src/App.tsx:              animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1, y: 0 }}
src/App.tsx:              exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9, y: 20 }}
src/App.tsx:              className="relative w-full max-w-2xl bg-white rounded-[2rem] md:rounded-[3rem] p-6 md:p-10 shadow-2xl overflow-y-auto max-h-[90vh]"
src/App.tsx:            >
src/App.tsx:              <h3 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-black text-[#2D2424] mb-6 md:mb-8">Create New Post</h3>
src/App.tsx:              <div className="space-y-4 md:space-y-6">
src/App.tsx:                <div>
src/App.tsx:                  <label className="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-[#B9AFAF] mb-2 px-1">Caption</label>
src/App.tsx:                  <textarea 
src/App.tsx:                    value={newJob.content}
src/App.tsx:                    onChange={e => setNewJob({...newJob, content: e.target.value})}
src/App.tsx:                    className="w-full h-32 px-6 py-4 bg-[#FDF2F2] border-none rounded-2xl text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FFD1D1] transition-all outline-none resize-none"
src/App.tsx:                    placeholder="Write your caption here..."
src/App.tsx:                  />
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:                <div>
src/App.tsx:                  <label className="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-[#B9AFAF] mb-2 px-1">Target Platforms</label>
src/App.tsx:                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 md:gap-3">
src/App.tsx:                    {['Instagram', 'Facebook', 'TikTok'].map(p => (
src/App.tsx:                      <button 
src/App.tsx:                        key={p}
src/App.tsx:                        onClick={() => {
src/App.tsx:                          const next = newJob.platforms.includes(p) 
src/App.tsx:                            ? newJob.platforms.filter(x => x !== p)
src/App.tsx:                            : [...newJob.platforms, p];
src/App.tsx:                          setNewJob({...newJob, platforms: next});
src/App.tsx:                        }}
src/App.tsx:                        className={cn(
src/App.tsx:                          "px-4 md:px-6 py-2 md:py-3 rounded-xl text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold transition-all",
src/App.tsx:                          newJob.platforms.includes(p) ? "bg-[#2D2424] text-white" : "bg-[#FDF2F2] text-[#8B7E7E]"
src/App.tsx:                        )}
src/App.tsx:                      >
src/App.tsx:                        {p}
src/App.tsx:                      </button>
src/App.tsx:                    ))}
src/App.tsx:                  </div>
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:                <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 md:gap-4 pt-4 md:pt-6">
src/App.tsx:                  <button onClick={() => setIsCreating(false)} className="w-full sm:flex-1 py-4 bg-[#FDF2F2] text-[#2D2424] rounded-xl font-bold">Cancel</button>
src/App.tsx:                  <button onClick={handlePublish} className="w-full sm:flex-1 py-4 bg-[#2D2424] text-white rounded-xl font-bold">Schedule Post</button>
src/App.tsx:                </div>
src/App.tsx:              </div>
src/App.tsx:            </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:          </div>
src/App.tsx:        )}
src/App.tsx:      </AnimatePresence>
src/App.tsx:    </motion.div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:}
src/App.tsx:
src/App.tsx:function Input({ label, value, onChange, placeholder }: { label: string, value: string, onChange: (v: string) => void, placeholder?: string }) {
src/App.tsx:  return (
src/App.tsx:    <div>
src/App.tsx:      <label className="block text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-[#B9AFAF] mb-2 px-1">{label}</label>
src/App.tsx:      <input 
src/App.tsx:        type="text" 
src/App.tsx:        value={value}
src/App.tsx:        onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)}
src/App.tsx:        placeholder={placeholder}
src/App.tsx:        className="w-full px-6 py-4 bg-[#FDF2F2] border-none rounded-2xl text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FFD1D1] transition-all outline-none"
src/App.tsx:      />
src/App.tsx:    </div>
src/App.tsx:  );
src/App.tsx:}

firestore.rules:    //
firestore.rules:    // ===============================================================
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Helper Functions
firestore.rules:    function isAuthenticated() {
firestore.rules:      return request.auth != null;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isOwner(userId) {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && request.auth.uid == userId;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isDocOwner() {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && request.auth.uid == resource.data.ownerId;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    function isBrandOwner(brandId) {
firestore.rules:      return isAuthenticated() && get(/databases/$(database)/documents/brands/$(brandId)).data.ownerId == request.auth.uid;
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Brands
firestore.rules:    match /brands/{brandId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isOwner(resource.data.ownerId);
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && request.resource.data.ownerId == request.auth.uid;
firestore.rules:      allow update: if isOwner(resource.data.ownerId);
firestore.rules:      allow delete: if isOwner(resource.data.ownerId);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:
firestore.rules:    // Research
firestore.rules:    match /brand_research/{brandId} {
firestore.rules:      allow read: if isOwner(resource.data.ownerId) || isBrandOwner(brandId);
firestore.rules:      allow create: if isAuthenticated() && (request.resource.data.ownerId == request.auth.uid || isBrandOwner(brandId));
firestore.rules:      allow update: if isOwner(resource.data.ownerId) || isBrandOwner(brandId);
firestore.rules:    }
firestore.rules:

functions/src/index.ts: * WhatsApp Webhook Function
functions/src/index.ts: * Handles Meta verification (GET) and incoming events (POST)
functions/src/index.ts: */
functions/src/index.ts:export const whatsappWebhook = functions.https.onRequest(async (req, res) => {
functions/src/index.ts:  // 1. Handle Meta Webhook Verification (GET)
functions/src/index.ts:  if (req.method === "GET") {
functions/src/index.ts:    const mode = req.query["hub.mode"];
functions/src/index.ts:    const token = req.query["hub.verify_token"];
functions/src/index.ts:    const challenge = req.query["hub.challenge"];
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:    // Check if mode and token are correct
functions/src/index.ts:    if (mode === "subscribe" && token === "abqarino_verify_token") {
functions/src/index.ts:      functions.logger.info("WEBHOOK_VERIFIED");
functions/src/index.ts:      res.status(200).send(challenge);
functions/src/index.ts:    } else {
functions/src/index.ts:      functions.logger.warn("VERIFICATION_FAILED", {mode, token});
functions/src/index.ts:      res.sendStatus(403);
functions/src/index.ts:    }
functions/src/index.ts:    return;
functions/src/index.ts:  }
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:  // 2. Handle Incoming WhatsApp Events (POST)
functions/src/index.ts:  if (req.method === "POST") {
functions/src/index.ts:    const body = req.body;
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:    // Log the payload for debugging
functions/src/index.ts:    functions.logger.info("WHATSAPP_EVENT_RECEIVED", {
functions/src/index.ts:      body: JSON.stringify(body, null, 2),
functions/src/index.ts:    });
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:    try {
functions/src/index.ts:      // Check if this is a WhatsApp Business API payload
functions/src/index.ts:      if (body.object === "whatsapp_business_account" && body.entry) {
functions/src/index.ts:        for (const entry of body.entry) {
functions/src/index.ts:          for (const change of entry.changes) {
functions/src/index.ts:            const value = change.value;
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:            // Check if there are messages in this change
functions/src/index.ts:            if (value.messages && value.messages.length > 0) {
functions/src/index.ts:              const contact = value.contacts ? value.contacts[0] : null;
functions/src/index.ts:              const message = value.messages[0];
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:              // Extract data
functions/src/index.ts:              const customerWaId = contact ? contact.wa_id : message.from;
functions/src/index.ts:              const customerName = contact && contact.profile ? contact.profile.name : "Unknown";
functions/src/index.ts:              const metaMessageId = message.id;
functions/src/index.ts:              const messageType = message.type;
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:              let content = "";
functions/src/index.ts:              if (messageType === "text") {
functions/src/index.ts:                content = message.text.body;
functions/src/index.ts:              } else if (messageType === "interactive") {
functions/src/index.ts:                content = message.interactive.button_reply?.title || 
functions/src/index.ts:                          message.interactive.list_reply?.title || 
functions/src/index.ts:                          "Interactive Message";
functions/src/index.ts:              } else if (messageType === "button") {
functions/src/index.ts:                content = message.button.text;
functions/src/index.ts:              } else {
functions/src/index.ts:                content = `[${messageType}]`;
functions/src/index.ts:              }
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:              // 1. Find or Create Conversation
functions/src/index.ts:              const conversationId = await findOrCreateConversation(customerWaId, customerName, content);
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:              // 2. Save Incoming Message
functions/src/index.ts:              await saveIncomingMessage(conversationId, customerWaId, messageType, content, metaMessageId, body);
functions/src/index.ts:              
functions/src/index.ts:              functions.logger.info("MESSAGE_PROCESSED", {conversationId, metaMessageId});
functions/src/index.ts:            }
functions/src/index.ts:          }
functions/src/index.ts:        }
functions/src/index.ts:        res.status(200).send("EVENT_RECEIVED");
functions/src/index.ts:      } else {
functions/src/index.ts:        // Not a WhatsApp message event (could be a status update or other)
functions/src/index.ts:        res.status(200).send("NOT_A_MESSAGE_EVENT");
functions/src/index.ts:      }
functions/src/index.ts:    } catch (error) {
functions/src/index.ts:      functions.logger.error("WEBHOOK_PROCESSING_ERROR", error);
functions/src/index.ts:      res.status(200).send("PROCESSED_WITH_ERROR");
functions/src/index.ts:    }
functions/src/index.ts:    return;
functions/src/index.ts:  }
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:  // 3. Handle Unsupported Methods
functions/src/index.ts:  res.sendStatus(405);
functions/src/index.ts:});
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:/**
functions/src/index.ts: * Helper: Find or Create a Conversation
functions/src/index.ts: */
functions/src/index.ts:async function findOrCreateConversation(customerWaId: string, customerName: string, lastMessage: string) {
functions/src/index.ts:  const brandId = "cosmetica_agency"; // Temporary fixed value
functions/src/index.ts:  const conversationsRef = db.collection("whatsapp_conversations");
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:  // Query for existing conversation with this wa_id
functions/src/index.ts:  const query = await conversationsRef
functions/src/index.ts:    .where("customerWaId", "==", customerWaId)
functions/src/index.ts:    .where("brandId", "==", brandId)
functions/src/index.ts:    .limit(1)
functions/src/index.ts:    .get();
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:  const now = admin.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp();
functions/src/index.ts:
functions/src/index.ts:  if (!query.empty) {
functions/src/index.ts:    const doc = query.docs[0];
functions/src/index.ts:    const data = doc.data();
functions/src/index.ts:    
functions/src/index.ts:    await doc.ref.update({
functions/src/index.ts:      lastMessage,
functions/src/index.ts:      lastMessageAt: now,
functions/src/index.ts:      updatedAt: now,
functions/src/index.ts:      customerName: customerName !== "Unknown" ? customerName : data.customerName
functions/src/index.ts:    });
functions/src/index.ts:    return doc.id;
functions/src/index.ts:  } else {
functions/src/index.ts:    const newDoc = await conversationsRef.add({
functions/src/index.ts:      brandId,
functions/src/index.ts:      customerWaId,
functions/src/index.ts:      customerName,
functions/src/index.ts:      lastMessage,
functions/src/index.ts:      lastMessageAt: now,
functions/src/index.ts:      status: "open",
functions/src/index.ts:      createdAt: now,
functions/src/index.ts:      updatedAt: now
functions/src/index.ts:    });
functions/src/index.ts:    return newDoc.id;
functions/src/index.ts:  }
functions/src/index.ts:}

function length(string) {\r\n    var p = string.length;\r\n    if (!p)\r\n        return 0;\r\n    var n = 0;\r\n    while (--p % 4 > 1 && string.charAt(p) === \"=\")\r\n        ++n;\r\n    return encode(buffer, start, end) {\r\n    var parts = null,\r\n        chunk = [];\r\n    var i = 0, // output index\r\n        j = 0, // goto index\r\n        t;     // temporary\r\n    while (start < end) {\r\n        var b = buffer[start++];\r\n        switch (j) {\r\n            case 0:\r\n                chunk[i++] = b64[b >> 2];\r\n                t = (b & 3) << 4;\r\n                j = 1;\r\n    if (val === 0)\r\n                writeUint(1 / val > 0 ? /* positive */ 0 : /* negative 0 */ 2147483648, buf, pos);\r\n            else if (isNaN(val))\r\n                writeUint(2143289344, {string} path Path to normalize\r\n * @returns {string} Normalized path\r\n */\r\npath.normalize = function normalize(path) {\r\n    path = path.replace(/\\\\/g, \"/\")\r\n Use {@link Field} instead.\n * @classdesc Base class of all reflected message fields. This is not an actual class but here for the sake of having consistent type definitions.\n * @exports FieldBase\n * @extends ReflectionObject\n * @constructor\n * @param {string} name Unique name within its namespace\n * @param {number} id Unique id within its namespace\n * @param {string} type Value type\n * @param {string|Object.<string,*>} [rule=\"optional\"] Field rule\n * @param {string|Object.<string,*>} [extend] Extended type if different from parent\n * @param {Object.<string,*>} [options] Declared options\n * @param {string} [comment] Comment associated with this field\n */\nfunction Field(name, id, type, rule, extend, options, comment) {\n\n    if (util.isObject(rule)) {\n        comment = extend;\n        options = rule;\n        rule = extend = undefined;\n    } else if (util.isObject(extend)) {\n        comment = options;\n        options = extend;\n        extend = undefined;\n    }\n\n    ReflectionObject.call(this, name, options);\n\n    if (!util.isInteger(id) || id < 0)\n        throw TypeError(\"id must be a non-negative integer\");\n\n    if (!util.isString(type))\n        throw TypeError(\"type must be a string\");\n\n    if (rule !== undefined && !ruleRe.test(rule = rule.toString().toLowerCase()))\n        throw TypeError(\"rule must be a string rule\");\n\n    if (extend !== undefined && !util.isString(extend))\n        throw TypeError(\"extend must be a string\");\n\n    /**\n     * Field rule, if any.\n     * @type {string|undefined}\n     */\n    if (rule === \"proto3_optional\") {\n        rule = \"optional\";\n    }\n    this.rule = rule && rule !== \"optional\" ? rule : undefined; // toJSON\n\n    /**\n     * Field type.\n     * @type {string}\n     */\n    this.type = type; // toJSON\n\n    /**\n     * Unique field id.\n     * @type {number}\n     */\n    this.id = id; // toJSON, marker\n\n    /**\n     * Extended type if different from parent.\n     * @type {string|undefined}\n     */\n    this.extend = extend || undefined; // toJSON\n\n    /**\n     * Whether this field is repeated.\n     * @type {boolean}\n     */\n    this.repeated = rule === \"repeated\";\n\n    /**\n     * Whether this field is a map or not.\n     * @type {boolean}\n     */\n    this.map = false;\n\n    /**\n     * Message this field belongs to.\n     * @type {Type|null}\n     */\n    this.message = null;\n\n    /**\n     * OneOf this field belongs to, if any,\n     * @type {OneOf|null}\n     */\n    this.partOf = null;\n\n    /**\n     * The field type's default value.\n     * @type {*}\n     */\n    this.typeDefault = null;\n\n    /**\n     * The field's default value on prototypes.\n     * @type {*}\n     */\n    this.defaultValue = null;\n\n    /**\n     * Whether this field's value should be treated as a long.\n     * @type {boolean}\n     */\n    this.long = util.Long ? types.long[type] !== undefined : /* istanbul ignore next */ false;\n\n    /**\n     * Whether this field's value is a buffer.\n     * @type {boolean}\n     */\n    this.bytes = type === \"bytes\";\n\n    /**\n     * Resolved type if not a basic type.\n     * @type {Type|Enum|null}\n     */\n    this.resolvedType = null;\n\n    /**\n     * Sister-field within the extended type if a declaring extension field.\n     * @type {Field|null}\n     */\n    this.extensionField = null;\n\n    /**\n     * Sister-field within the declaring namespace if an extended field.\n     * @type {Field|null}\n     */\n    this.declaringField = null;\n\n    /**\n     * Comment for this field.\n     * @type {string|null}\n     */\n    this.comment = comment;\n}\n\n/**\n * Determines whether this field is required.\n * @name Field#required\n * @type {boolean}\n * @readonly\n */\nObject.defineProperty(Field.prototype, \"required\", {\n    get: function() {\n        return this._features.field_presence === \"LEGACY_REQUIRED\";\n    }\n});\n\n/**\n * Determines whether this field is not required.\n * @name Field#optional\n * @type {boolean}\n * @readonly\n */\nObject.defineProperty(Field.prototype, \"optional\", {\n    get: function() {\n        return !this.required;\n    }\n});\n\n/**\n * Determines whether this field uses tag-delimited encoding. \"boolean\") {\n        parentAlreadyChecked = filterTypes;\n        filterTypes = undefined;\n    } else if (filterTypes && !Array.isArray(filterTypes))\n        filterTypes = [ filterTypes ];\n\n    if (util.isString(path) && path.length) {\n        if (path === \".\")\n            return this.root;\n        path = path.split(\".\");\n    } else if (!path.length)\n        return this;\n\n    var flatPath = path.join(\".\");\n\n    // Start at root if path is absolute\n    if (path[0] === \"\")\n        return this.root.lookup(path.slice(1), filterTypes);\n\n    // Early bailout for objects with matching absolute paths\n    var found = this.root._fullyQualifiedObjects && this.root._fullyQualifiedObjects[\".\" + flatPath];\n    if (found && (!filterTypes || filterTypes.indexOf(found.constructor) > -1)) {\n        return found;\n    }\n\n    // Do a regular lookup at this namespace and below\n    found = this._lookupImpl(path, flatPath);\n    if (found && (!filterTypes || filterTypes.indexOf(found.constructor) > -1)) {\n        return found;\n    }\n\n    if (parentAlreadyChecked)\n        return null;\n\n    // If there hasn't been a match, walk up the tree and look more broadly\n    var current = this;\n    while (current.parent) {\n        found = current.parent._lookupImpl(path, flatPath);\n        if (found && (!filterTypes || filterTypes.indexOf(found.constructor) > -1)) {\n            return found;\n        }\n        current = current.parent;\n    }\n    return null;\n};\n\n/**\n * Internal helper for lookup that handles traverse if path contains more\n    var found = this.get(path[0]);\n    var exact = null;\n    if (found) {\n        if (path.length === 1) {\n            exact = found;\n        } else if (found instanceof Namespace) {\n            path = path.slice(1);\n            exact = found._lookupImpl(path, path.join(\".\"));\n        }\n\n    // Otherwise try each nested namespace\n    } else {\n found;\n    }\n\n    // Set this even when null, so that when we walk up the tree we can quickly bail on repeated checks back down.\n    this._lookupCache[flatPath] = exact;\n    return // only if part of a root\n    return this;\n};\n\n/**\n * Resolves this objects editions features.\n * @param {string} edition The edition we're currently resolving for.\n * @returns {ReflectionObject} `this`\n */\nReflectionObject.prototype._resolveFeaturesRecursive = function _resolveFeaturesRecursive(edition) {\n    return this._resolveFeatures(this._edition || edition);\n};\n\n/**\n * Resolves child features from parent features\n * @param {string} edition The edition we're currently resolving for.\n * @returns {undefined}\n */\nReflectionObject.prototype._resolveFeatures = function _resolveFeatures(edition) {\n    if (this._featuresResolved) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    var defaults = {};\n\n    /* istanbul ignore if */\n    if (!edition) {\n        throw new Error(\"Unknown edition for \" + this.fullName);\n    }\n\n    var protoFeatures = Object.assign(this.options ? Object.assign({},  this.options.features) : {},\n        this._inferLegacyProtoFeatures(edition));\n\n    if (this._edition) {\n        // For a namespace marked with a specific edition, reset defaults.\n        /* istanbul ignore else */\n        if (edition === \"proto2\") {\n            defaults = Object.assign({}, proto2Defaults);\n        } else if (edition === \"proto3\") {\n            defaults = Object.assign({}, proto3Defaults);\n        } else if (edition === \"2023\") {\n            defaults = Object.assign({}, editions2023Defaults);\n        } else {\n            throw new Error(\"Unknown edition: \" + edition);\n        }\n        this._features = Object.assign(defaults, protoFeatures || {});\n        this._featuresResolved = true;\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // fields in Oneofs aren't actually children of them, so we have to\n    // special-case it\n    /* istanbul ignore else */\n    if (this.partOf instanceof OneOf) {\n        var lexicalParentFeaturesCopy = Object.assign({}, this.partOf._features);\n        this._features = Object.assign(lexicalParentFeaturesCopy, protoFeatures || {});\n    } else if (this.declaringField) {\n        // Skip feature fetch(filename, weak) {\n        filename = getBundledFileName(filename) || filename;\n\n        // Skip if already loaded / attempted\n        if (self.files.indexOf(filename) > -1) {\n            return;\n        }\n        self.files.push(filename);\n\n        // Shortcut bundled definitions\n        if (filename in common) {\n            if (sync) {\n                process(filename, common[filename]);\n            } else {\n                ++queued;\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    --queued;\n                    process(filename, common[filename]);\n calculates its byte length and puts it into a linked\n    // list of operations to perform when finish() is called. context\r\n * @param {...*} params Function arguments\r\n * @returns {Promise<*>} Promisified function\r\n */\r\nfunction asPromise(fn, ctx/*, varargs */) {\r\n    var params  = new function length(string) {\r\n    var p = string.length;\r\n    if (!p)\r\n        return 0;\r\n    var n = 0;\r\n    while (--p % 4 > 1 && string.charAt(p) === \"=\")\r\n        ++n;\r\n    return 43, 47\r\nfor (var i = 0; i < 64;)\r\n    s64[b64[i] = i < 26 ? i + 65 : i < 52 ? i + 71 : i < 62 ? i - 4 : i - 59 | 43] = i++;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Encodes a buffer to a base64 encoded string.\r\n * encode(buffer, start, end) {\r\n    var parts = null,\r\n        chunk = [];\r\n    var i = 0, // output index\r\n        j = 0, // goto index\r\n        t;     // temporary\r\n    while (start < end)    (parts || (parts = [])).push(String.fromCharCode.apply(String, chunk));\r\n            i = 0;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    if (j) {\r\n        chunk[i++] = b64[t];\r\n        chunk[i++] = 61;\r\n @namespace\r\n */\r\nvar path = exports;\r\n\r\nvar isAbsolute =\r\n/**\r\n * Tests if the specified path is absolute.\r\n * @param {string} path Path to test\r\n * @returns {boolean} `true` if path is absolute\r\n */\r\npath.isAbsolute = function isAbsolute(path) {\r\n    return /^(?:\\/|\\w+:)/.test(path);\r\n};\r\n\r\nvar normalize =\r\n/**\r\n * Normalizes the specified path.\r\n * @param {string} path Path to normalize\r\n * @returns {string} Normalized path\r\n */\r\npath.normalize = function normalize(path) {\r\n    path = path.replace(/\\\\/g, \"/\")\r\n               .replace(/\\/{2,}/g, \"/\");\r\n    var parts    = path.split(\"/\"),\r\n        absolute = isAbsolute(path),\r\n        prefix   = \"\";\r\n    if (absolute)\r\n        prefix = parts.shift() + \"/\";\r\n    for (var i = 0; i < parts.length;) {\r\n        if (parts[i] === \"..\") {\r\n            if (i > 0 && parts[i - 1] !== \"..\")\r\n                parts.splice(--i, 2);\r\n            else if (absolute)\r\n                parts.splice(i, 1);\r\n            else\r\n                ++i;\r\n        } else if (parts[i] === \".\")\r\n            parts.splice(i, 1);\r\n        else\r\n            ++i;\r\n    }\r\n    return prefix + parts.join(\"/\");\r\n};\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Resolves the specified include path against the specified origin path.\r\n * @param {string} originPath Path to the origin file\r\n * @param {string} includePath Include path relative to origin path\r\n * @param {boolean} [alreadyNormalized=false] `true` if both paths are already known to be normalized\r\n * @returns {string} Path to the include file\r\n */\r\npath.resolve = function resolve(originPath, includePath, alreadyNormalized) {\r\n    if (!alreadyNormalized)\r\n        includePath = normalize(includePath);\r\n    if (isAbsolute(includePath))\r\n        return includePath;\r\n    if (!alreadyNormalized)\r\n        originPath = normalize(originPath);\r\n    return (originPath = {@link util.pool}.\r\n * @typedef PoolSlicer\r\n * @type {function}\r\n * @param {number} start Start offset\r\n * @param {number} end End offset\r\n * @returns {Uint8Array} Buffer slice\r\n * @this {Uint8Array}\r\n */\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * A general purpose buffer pool.\r\n * @memberof util\r\n * @function\r\n * @param {PoolAllocator} alloc Allocator\r\n * @param {PoolSlicer} slice Slicer\r\n * @param {number} [size=8192] Slab size\r\n * @returns {PoolAllocator} Pooled allocator\r\n */\r\nfunction pool(alloc, slice, size) {\r\n    var SIZE   = size || 8192;\r\n    var MAX    = SIZE >>> 1;\r\n    var slab   = null;\r\n    var offset = SIZE;\r\n    return function pool_alloc(size) {\r\n        if (size < 1 || size > MAX)\r\n            return alloc(size);\r\n        if (offset + size > SIZE) {\r\n            slab = alloc(SIZE);\r\n            offset = 0;\r\n        }\r\n        var buf = slice.call(slab, offset, offset += size);\r\n        if (offset & 7) // align to 32 bit\r\n @namespace\r\n */\r\nvar utf8 = exports;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Calculates the UTF8 byte length of a string.\r\n * @param {string} string String\r\n * @returns {number} Byte length\r\n */\r\nutf8.length = function utf8_length(string) {\r\n    var len = 0,\r\n        c = 0;\r\n    for (var i = 0; i < string.length; ++i) {\r\n        c = string.charCodeAt(i);\r\n        if (c < 128)\r\n            len += 1;\r\n        else if (c < 2048)\r\n            len += 2;\r\n        else if ((c & 0xFC00) === 0xD800 && (string.charCodeAt(i + 1) & 0xFC00) === 0xDC00) {\r\n            ++i;\r\n            len += 4;\r\n        } else\r\n            len += 3;\r\n    }\r\n    return len;\r\n};\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Reads UTF8 bytes as a string.\r\n * @param {Uint8Array} buffer Source buffer\r\n * @param {number} start Source start\r\n * @param {number} end Source end\r\n * @returns {string} String read\r\n */\r\nutf8.read = function utf8_read(buffer, start, end) {\r\n    var len = end - start;\r\n    if (len < 1)\r\n        return \"\";\r\n    var parts = null,\r\n        chunk = [],\r\n        i = 0, // char offset\r\n        t;     // temporary\r\n    while (start < end) {\r\n        t = buffer[start++];\r\n        if (t < 128)\r\n            chunk[i++] = t;\r\n        else if (t > 191 && t < 224)\r\n            chunk[i++] = (t & 31) << 6 | buffer[start++] & 63;\r\n        else if (t > 239 && t < 365) {\r\n            t = ((t & 7) << 18 | (buffer[start++] & 63) << 12 | (buffer[start++] & 63) << 6 | buffer[start++] & 63) - 0x10000;\r\n            chunk[i++] = 0xD800 + (t >> parts.push(String.fromCharCode.apply(String, chunk.slice(0, i)));\r\n        return parts.join(\"\");\r\n    }\r\n    return String.fromCharCode.apply(String, chunk.slice(0, i));\r\n};\r\n\r\n/**\r\n 6       | 192;\r\n            buffer[offset++] = c1       & 63 | 128;\r\n        } else if ((c1 & 0xFC00) === 0xD800 && ((c2 = string.charCodeAt(i + 1)) & 0xFC00) === 0xDC00) {\r\n            c1 =                    this.nested = {};\n                object.setOptions(prev.options, true);\n\n            } else\n                throw Error(\"duplicate name '\" + object.name + \"' in \" +   while (path.length > 0) {\n        var part = path.shift();\n        if (ptr.nested && ptr.nested[part]) {\n            ptr = ptr.nested[part];\n            if (!(ptr instanceof Namespace))\n                throw Error(\"path conflicts with non-namespace objects\");\n        } else\n            ptr.add(ptr = new Namespace(part));\n    }\n    if (json)\n        ptr.addJSON(json);\n    return ptr;\n};\n\n/**\n * Resolves this namespace's and all its nested objects' type references. Useful to validate a reflection tree, but comes at a cost.\n * @returns {Namespace} `this`\n */\nNamespace.prototype.resolveAll = function resolveAll() {\n    if (!this._needsRecursiveResolve) return this;\n\n    this._resolveFeaturesRecursive(this._edition);\n\n    var nested = this.nestedArray, i = 0;\n    this.resolve();\n    while (i < nested.length)\n        if (nested[i] instanceof */\nNamespace.prototype._resolveFeaturesRecursive = function _resolveFeaturesRecursive(edition) {\n    if (!this._needsRecursiveFeatureResolution) return this;\n path in the scope of this namespace.\n * @param {string|string[]} path Path to look up\n * @param {*|Array.<*>} filterTypes Filter types, any combination of the constructors of `protobuf.Type`, `protobuf.Enum`, `protobuf.Service` etc.\n * @param {boolean} [parentAlreadyChecked=false] If known, whether the parent has already been checked\n * @returns {ReflectionObject|null} Looked up object or `null` if none could be found\n */\nNamespace.prototype.lookup = function lookup(path, filterTypes, parentAlreadyChecked) {\n    /* istanbul ignore next */\n    if (typeof filterTypes === \"boolean\") {\n        parentAlreadyChecked = filterTypes;\n        filterTypes = undefined;\n    } else if (filterTypes && !Array.isArray(filterTypes))\n        filterTypes = [ filterTypes ];\n\n    if (util.isString(path) && path.length) {\n        if (path === \".\")\n            return this.root;\n        path = path.split(\".\");\n    } else if (!path.length)\n        return this;\n\n    var flatPath = path.join(\".\");\n\n    // Start at root if path is absolute\n    if (path[0] === \"\")\n        return this.root.lookup(path.slice(1), filterTypes);\n\n    // Early bailout for objects with matching absolute paths\n    var found = this.root._fullyQualifiedObjects && this.root._fullyQualifiedObjects[\".\" + flatPath];\n    if (found && (!filterTypes || filterTypes.indexOf(found.constructor) > -1)) {\n        return found;\n    }\n\n    // Do a regular lookup at this namespace and below\n    found = this._lookupImpl(path, flatPath);\n    if (found && (!filterTypes || filterTypes.indexOf(found.constructor) > -1)) {\n        return found;\n    }\n\n    if (parentAlreadyChecked)\n        return null;\n\n    // If there hasn't been a match, walk up the tree and look more broadly\n    var current = this;\n    while (current.parent) {\n        found = current.parent._lookupImpl(path, flatPath);\n        if (found && (!filterTypes || filterTypes.indexOf(found.constructor) > -1)) {\n            return found;\n        }\n        current = current.parent;\n    }\n    return null;\n};\n\n/**\n * Internal helper for lookup that handles searching just at this namespace and below along with caching.\n * @param {string[]} path Path to look up\n * @param {string} flatPath Flattened version of the path to use as a cache key\n * @returns {ReflectionObject|null} Looked up object or `null` if none could be found\n * @private\n */\nNamespace.prototype._lookupImpl = function lookup(path, flatPath) {\n    if(Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(this._lookupCache, flatPath)) {\n        return this._lookupCache[flatPath];\n    }\n\n    // Test if the first part matches any nested object, and if so, traverse if path contains more\n    var found = this.get(path[0]);\n    var exact = null;\n    if (found) {\n        if (path.length === 1) {\n            exact = found;\n        } else if (found instanceof Namespace) {\n            path = path.slice(1);\n            exact = found._lookupImpl(path, path.join(\".\"));\n        }\n\n    // Otherwise try each nested namespace\n    } else {\n found;\n    }\n\n    // Set this even when null, so that when we walk up the tree we can quickly bail on repeated checks back down.\n    this._lookupCache[flatPath] = exact;\n    return exact;\n};\n\n/**\n * Looks up the reflection object at the specified path, relative to this namespace.\n * @name NamespaceBase#lookup\n * @function\n * @param {string|string[]} path Path to look up\n */\n// lookup(path: string, [parentAlreadyChecked: boolean])\n\n/**\n * Looks up the {@link Type|type} at the specified path, relative to this namespace.\n * Besides its signature, this methods util.asPromise(load, self, filename, options);\n    }\n\n    var sync = callback === SYNC; // undocumented\n\n    // Finishes loading by calling the callback (exactly once)\n    function finish(err, fetch(filename, weak) {\n        filename = getBundledFileName(filename) || filename;\n\n        // Skip if already loaded / attempted\n        if (self.files.indexOf(filename) > -1) {\n            return;\n        }\n        self.files.push(filename);\n\n        // Shortcut bundled definitions\n        if (filename in common) {\n            if (sync) {\n                process(filename, common[filename]);\n            } else {\n                ++queued;\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    --queued;\n                    process(filename, common[filename]);\n                });\n            }\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Otherwise fetch from disk or network\n        if (sync) {\n            var source;\n            try {\n                source = util.fs.readFileSync(filename).toString(\"utf8\");\n            } catch (err) {\n                if (!weak)\n                    finish(err);\n                return;\n            }\n            process(filename, source);\n        } else {\n            ++queued;\n            self.fetch(filename, function(err, source) {\n                --queued;\n                /* istanbul ignore if */\n        }\n                process(filename, source);\n            });\n        }\n    }\n    var queued = 0;\n\n    // Assembling the root namespace doesn't require working type\n    // references * @returns {boolean} `true` if successfully added to the extended type, `false` otherwise\n * @inner\n * @ignore\n */\nfunction tryHandleExtension(root, field) {\n    var extendedType = field.parent.lookup(field.extend);\n    if (extendedType) {\n        var sisterField = new Field(field.fullName, field.id, field.type, field.rule, undefined, field.options);\n        //do not allow to extend same field twice to prevent the error\n        if (extendedType.get(sisterField.name)) {\n            return true;\n        }\n        sisterField.declaringField = field;\n        field.extensionField = sisterField;\n        extendedType.add(sisterField);\n        return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Called when any object is added to this root or its (!tryHandleExtension(this, object))\n                this.deferred.push(object);\n\n    } else if (object instanceof Enum) {\n\n        if (exposeRe.test(object.name))\n            object.parent[object.name] = object.values; // expose enum values as property of its parent\n\n    } else if (!(object instanceof OneOf)) /* everything else is a namespace */ {\n\n        if (object object.extensionField.parent.remove(object.extensionField);\n                object.extensionField = null;\n            } else { // cancel the extension\n                var index = @param {number} hi High 32 bits, unsigned\n */\nfunction LongBits(lo, hi) {\n\n    // note that the casts below are theoretically unnecessary as of today, but older statically\n    // generated converter code might still call the ctor with signed 32bits. kept for compat.\n\n    /**\n     * Low bits.\n     * @type {number}\n     */\n    this.lo = lo >>> 0;\n\n    /**\n     * High bits.\n     * @type {number}\n     */\n    this.hi = hi >>> 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Zero bits.\n * @memberof util.LongBits\n * @type {util.LongBits}\n */\nvar zero = LongBits.zero = new LongBits(0, 0);\n\nzero.toNumber = function() { return 0; };\nzero.zzEncode = zero.zzDecode = function() { return this; };\nzero.length = function() { return 1; };\n\n/**\n * Zero hash.\n * @memberof util.LongBits\n * @type {util.LongBits} Instance\n */\nLongBits.fromNumber = function fromNumber(value) {\n    if (value === 0)\n        return zero;\n    var sign = value < 0;\n    if (sign)\n        value = -value;\n    var lo = value >>> 0,\n        hi = (value - lo) / 4294967296 >>> 0;\n    if (sign) {\n        hi = ~hi >>> 0;\n        lo = ~lo >>> 0;\n        if (++lo > 4294967295) {\n            lo = 0;\n            if (++hi > 4294967295)\n                hi = 0;\n        }\n    }\n    return new LongBits(lo, hi);\n};\n\n/**\n * Constructs new long bits from a number, long or string.\n * @param LongBits.fromNumber(parseInt(value, 10));\n    }\n    return value.low || value.high ? new LongBits(value.low >>> 0, value.high >>> 0) : zero;\n};\n\n/**\n * Converts this long bits to a possibly unsafe JavaScript number.\n * @param {boolean} [unsigned=false] Whether unsigned or not\n * @returns {number} Possibly unsafe number\n */\nLongBits.prototype.toNumber = function toNumber(unsigned) {\n 4294967296);\n    }\n    return this.lo + this.hi * 4294967296;\n};\n\n/**\n * Converts this long bits to a long.\n * @param {boolean} [unsigned=false] Whether unsigned or not\n * @returns {Long}    : { low: this.lo | 0, high: this.hi | 0, unsigned: Boolean(unsigned) };\n};\n\nvar charCodeAt = String.prototype.charCodeAt;\n\n/**\n * Constructs new long bits from the specified 8 characters long hash.\n * @param {string} hash Hash\n * @returns {util.LongBits} Bits\n */\nLongBits.fromHash = function fromHash(hash) {\n    if (hash === zeroHash)\n        return zero;\n    return new LongBits(\n        ( charCodeAt.call(hash, 0)\n        | charCodeAt.call(hash, 1) << 8\n        | charCodeAt.call(hash, 2) << 16\n        | charCodeAt.call(hash, 3) << 24) >>> 0\n    ,\n        ( 8  & 255,\n        this.lo >>> 16 & 255,\n        this.lo >>> 24      ,\n        this.hi        & 255,\n        this.hi >>> 8  & 255,\n        this.hi >>> 16 & 255,\n        this.hi >>> 24\n    );\n};\n\n/**\n * Zig-zag encodes this long bits.\n * @returns {util.LongBits} `this`\n */\nLongBits.prototype.zzEncode = function zzEncode() {\n    var mask =   this.hi >> 31;\n    this.hi  = Current buffer length.\n     * @type {number}\n     */\n    this.len = writer.len;\n\n    /**\n     * Next state.\n     * @type {State|null}\n     */\n    this.next = writer.states;\n}\n\n/**\n * This both allows us to allocate\n    // buffers of the exact required size and reduces the amount of work we have to do compared\n    // to first calculating over objects and then encoding over objects. In our case, the encoding\n    // part is just a linked list walk calling operations with already prepared values.\n}\n\nvar create = function create() {\n    return util.Buffer\n        ? function */\nif (util.Array !== Array)\n    Writer.alloc = util.pool(Writer.alloc, util.Array.prototype.subarray);\n\n/**\n * Pushes a new operation to the queue.\n * @param {function(Uint8Array, number, *)} fn Function to call\n * @param {number} len Value byte length\n * @param {number} val Value to write\n * @returns {Writer} `this`\n * @private\n */\nWriter.prototype._push = function push(fn, len, val) {\n    this.tail = this.tail.next = new Op(fn, len, val);\n    this.len += len;\n    return this;\n};\n\nfunction writeByte(val, buf, pos) {\n    buf[pos] = val & 255;\n}\n\nfunction writeVarint32(val, buf, pos) {\n    while (val > 127) {\n        buf[pos++] = val & 127 | 128;\n        val >>>= 7;\n    }\n    buf[pos] = val;\n}\n\n/**\n * Constructs a new varint writer operation instance.\n * @classdesc Scheduled varint writer operation.\n * @extends Op\n * @constructor\n * @param {number} len Value byte length\n * @param {number} val Value to write\n * @ignore\n */\nfunction VarintOp(len, val) {\n    this.len = len;\n    this.next = undefined;\n    this.val = val;\n}\n\nVarintOp.prototype = Object.create(Op.prototype);\nVarintOp.prototype.fn = writeVarint32;\n\n/**\n * Writes an unsigned 32 bit value as a varint.\n * @param {number} value Value to write\n * @returns {Writer} `this`\n */\nWriter.prototype.uint32 = function write_uint32(value) {\n    // here, the call this.tail.next = new VarintOp(\n        (value = value >>> 0)\n                < 128       ? 1\n        : value < 16384     ? 2\n        : value < 2097152   ? 3\n        : value < 268435456 ? 4\n write_sint32(value) {\n    return this.uint32((value << 1 ^ value >> 31) >>> 0);\n};\n\nfunction writeVarint64(val, buf, pos) {\n    while (val.hi) {\n        buf[pos++] = val.lo & 127 | 128;\n =  val         & 255;\n    buf[pos + 1] =  val >>> 8   & 255;\n    buf[pos + 2] =  val >>> 16  & 255;\n    buf[pos + 3] =  val >>> 24;\n}\n\n/**\n * Writes an unsigned 32 bit value as fixed 32 bits.\n * @param {number} value Value to write\n * @returns {Writer} `this`\n */\nWriter.prototype.fixed32 = function write_fixed32(value) {\n    return this._push(writeFixed32, 4, value >>> 0);\n};\n\n/**\n
